title: Tumion nuciferum

The Yellow Jessamine is a type of evergreen vine, characterized by its clusters of bright yellow, trumpet-shaped flowers. This plant is also known for its ability to thrive in a variety of environments, making it a popular choice for gardeners. Tumion nuciferum is often used as an ornamental plant in temperate climates.
